title: boshtweaks
description: Does what CobblemonTweaks did but better
body:
# Cobblemon 1.7 QOL
To help you with all your pokemon catching/breeding needs. 
Adds 3 new buttons to the bottom of the PC to help with releasing/organising your pc box 

## Completed Features:
- Multi-select toggle button for selecting multiple Pokemon
- Visual selection overlay (green highlight) on selected slots 
- Mass Release button with Pokemon count 
- Mass Move/Pick Up button for moving multiple Pokemon between boxes 
- Auto-clear selections when multi-select is turned off
- Mark icon indicator in the Pokemon overview (shows when Pokemon has marks/ribbons)
- Coloured Gradient Borders for shiny (gold), Perfect IV (Green) and Perfect shiny (Pink) Pokemon
- Pokopia pokemon, Give pokemon specific items to change their model!

## Planned Features:
- Add custom UI textures to the current buttons to fitt in theme with the PC
- Add separate icons for marked/ribbon instead of using one icon for both
- Save the last option you chose on summary screen i.e if you were looking at a pokemons IVs next time you open the box it will be back on the IV screen for summary 

## The 3 Added buttons at the bottom of the pc
![PC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46296805e324c6591866b26c63bdb34459ef4d4.webp)

## The Confirmation of mass releasing pokemons
![release](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa2d5ef77048129c572b293c135abdb4a7d291bd.webp)

## Example of Marked Pokemon
![Example of marked pokemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8081a35af80476d2273817325776637c0f9d4d96.png)

### Dependancies
1. Fabric loader 0.16.9 (or higher)
2. Fabric API 0.108.0+1.21.1 
3. Cobblemon 1.7
